# `api.views.get_dataset_sps`

> `GET /views/datasetsps` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.views.get_dataset_sps() -> list[StoredProcedureColumn]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab views get_dataset_sps
```

GET /views/datasetsps

## Response

Returns a list of `List[StoredProcedureColumn]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Column name |
| `dataType` | `Optional[str]` | no | Column data type |
| `isSortable` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Whether column is sortable |
